sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14570" key="a)ptw/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπτώξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without hares,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
